de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation

Class SLExpression

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation.SLExpression

  • public final class SLExpression
extends java.lang.Object
    This class represents the translation of an expression of an arbitrary specification language, which in the KeY world is either a term or a type.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SLExpression(KeYJavaType type) 
      SLExpression(Term term)
      USE WITH CARE! Term-SLExpressions should have a type!
